source.definition: arousing curiosity or holding attention because of being unusual, exciting, or important

explanation.sourceText: The English word "interesting" derives from the Latin participle "interessans," meaning "being involved or concerned with something."
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „interesting” provine din participiul latin „interessans”, care înseamnă „a fi implicat într-un lucru”.

source.additional: Describes things that capture attention or curiosity.

target.definition: de o asemenea natură încât trezește interesul sau curiozitatea

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "interesant" was borrowed from the French "intéressant," which in turn comes from the Latin participle "interessans" ("involved, important").
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „interesant” este împrumutat din francezul „intéressant”, care provine din participiul latin „interessans” („implicat, important”).

target.additional: In many contexts usable, e.g. education or media.

explanation.sourceText: Means something that arouses curiosity or attention.
explanation.targetText: Înseamnă ceva care trezește curiozitatea sau atenția.

examples.sourceText: The new design is very interesting.

explanation.sourceText: Used to describe something generally appealing.
explanation.targetText: Folosit pentru a descrie ceva atractiv pentru toată lumea.

examples.sourceText: The exhibition is interesting for all age groups.
examples.targetText: Expoziția este interesantă pentru toate vârstele.

examples.sourceText: I found the discussion very interesting.

examples.targetText: Prezentarea voastră a fost incredibil de interesantă.

examples.sourceText: There are many interesting articles on this website.
examples.targetText: Pe acest site sunt multe articole interesante.

learningTips.text: The English word "interesting" sounds very similar to the Romanian "interesant," making it easy to remember!
Think of things that catch your attention or spark your curiosity to remember "interesant."
Remember the word "interest" inside "interesting" to link it to curiosity and attention.
Connect "interesant" with interesting experiences that make you want to learn more.
